description: Rise of Avalon Patch 8 - Hotfix 2 (3 November 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes
sections.description: Note: this is a server-side Hotfix and does not require updating the game client.
items: Fixed an issue where it was possible to circumvent the normal logout timers by disconnecting and reconnecting
sections.searchable_text: Fixes logout timers circumvent disconnect reconnect server-side hotfix no client update
